problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
